# SlimFile
> Free online tool for image compression, PDF conversion, and social media resizing.

## What SlimFile does
- Compresses images to a user-specified target size (5%~50% of original)
- Converts multiple images into a single PDF file
- Resizes images to fit Instagram, Facebook, and other social media formats
- Works entirely in the browser — no signup required
- Free to use, no watermarks
- Bilingual interface: English and Korean (auto-detected by browser language)

## Image Compression
- Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC
- Target size slider: compress to 5%~50% of original (default 10%)
- Example: a 3MB photo becomes about 300KB at 10%
- Progressive JPEG output with metadata stripping
- Up to 20 files at once, max 10MB per file

## PDF Conversion
- Combine multiple images into a single PDF
- Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC input
- A4 page layout with auto-fit

## Social Media Resize
- Instagram Square: 1080x1080 (1:1)
- Instagram Portrait: 1080x1350 (4:5)
- Facebook Feed: 1200x630 (1.91:1)
- Facebook Story: 1080x1920 (9:16)

## Who uses SlimFile
- Job seekers compressing resume photos for Korean public institution submissions
- Teachers and instructors uploading profile documents
- Content creators resizing images for Instagram and Facebook
- Students submitting documents with file size limits
- Anyone needing to reduce file size for email or web upload

## Blog
- SEO-optimized articles about image compression, PDF tips, and file management
- Published at https://slimfile.net/blog
- Topics: PDF optimization, image compression guides, social media best practices

## FAQ
- https://slimfile.net/faq
- Covers pricing (free), file formats, privacy, upload limits
